creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

The tree is now in better shape than it was ~10 days ago, so I have been 
able to complete a run which gave better coverage.  Here are the suspected 
regressions. 

overall URL: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/index-category.html 

package failures: 

spamassassin requires 'ca_root_nss-3.13.4', but 'ca_root_nss-3.13.5' 
is installed: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/mailzu-0.8.r3_2.log 
http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/amavisd-milter-1.5.0_2.log 
http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/pybaz-1.5.3_3.log 

locale problem: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/ruby19-rbbr-0.6.0_11.log 

incompatible encoding regexp match: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9.20120619053541.pointyhat-west/quickml-0.7_12.log 

These are all leaf ports.  Since this -exp has been delayed more than 
once, I think it's fair to go ahead and commit and mark these as BROKEN 
in the meantime.  Otherwise, we may get further drift.
